title: User Guides - Onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens opened from App Settings > User Guides display correctly when navigating through all screens
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the menu icon (hamburger) or the Account/Settings icon to open the side menu.
In App Settings, scroll down and tap on 'User Guides'.
Tap on 'Onboarding' (or 'Onboarding screens') from the User Guides list.
Swipe left or tap the next arrow to navigate through all onboarding screens.
Continue navigating until the last onboarding screen is reached.
expected: All onboarding screens open and display correctly. Each screen shows proper content, images, and text without any layout issues, truncation, or graphical glitches. Navigation between screens is smooth and responsive.
